name: Daily Market Movers Wrap-up
description: Breaks down financial news into a fast, digestible daily market email.

variables.label: Finance News Feed
variables.hint: The financial news feed to monitor

agents.name: Mover Analyst
agents.systemPrompt: Read financial news summaries and identify the top 3 moving stocks. Extract the ticker, the price action direction, and the core reason *why* it moved.
agents.userPrompt:
Identify the top 3 movers from this news:

{finance_feed.summary}

agents.name: Jargon Translator
agents.systemPrompt: Translate heavy financial jargon into plain English suitable for retail investors. Explain complex concepts simply.
agents.userPrompt:
Translate these stock movements into plain English:

{mover_analyst.text}

agents.name: Wrap-up Writer
agents.systemPrompt: Format translated financial insights into a publishable daily email brief. Use a professional but accessible tone.
agents.userPrompt:
Write a daily market wrap-up email using these insights:

{jargon_translator.text}

name: Earnings Call Twitter Thread
description: Turns a dense earnings call into an accessible social media thread.

variables.label: Earnings Transcript Feed
variables.hint: Feed containing the earnings call summary

agents.name: Metric Extractor
agents.systemPrompt: Extract the key financial metrics from an earnings call: Revenue (beat/miss), EPS (beat/miss), user growth, and forward guidance.
agents.userPrompt:
Extract the key metrics from this earnings summary:

{earnings_feed.summary}

agents.name: Narrative Builder
agents.systemPrompt: Determine the 'story' of the earnings call based on the metrics. Is it a turnaround story? A guidance warning? A huge beat? Write a 1-paragraph summary of the narrative.

agents.name: Thread Writer
agents.systemPrompt: Draft a 5-tweet financial breakdown thread. Tweet 1: The Narrative Hook. Tweet 2: The raw numbers. Tweet 3/4: Context and guidance. Tweet 5: Conclusion/Takeaway.

name: Crypto 'Fear & Greed' Script
description: Analyzes crypto community sentiment to write a YouTube market update script.

variables.label: Crypto Subreddit Feed
variables.hint: Feed for a major crypto community (e.g. r/CryptoCurrency)

agents.name: Sentiment Scorer
agents.systemPrompt: Analyze retail crypto discussions to gauge the current emotion. Are people panicking, euphoric, bored, or skeptical? Provide a qualitative summary of the sentiment.
agents.userPrompt:
Analyze the sentiment in this feed:

{crypto_reddit.summary}

agents.name: Market Commentator
agents.systemPrompt: Draft a fast-paced YouTube script interpreting community sentiment. Compare their emotion to standard 'fear vs greed' market cycles. Use typical YouTube hook strategies.
agents.userPrompt:
Write a market update script based on this sentiment analysis:

{sentiment_scorer.text}

agents.name: Thumbnail Ideator
agents.systemPrompt: Suggest 3 high-CTR YouTube thumbnail concepts based on the video script. Include text overlays and visual descriptions.
agents.userPrompt:
Suggest 3 thumbnail ideas for this script:

{market_commentator.text}
